message:
feat: Add Google Photos CDN URL extraction and full-resolution download

- Add extractGooglePhotosBaseUrl() to parse CDN URLs and construct =s0 URLs
- Add downloadGooglePhotosFullRes() for direct full-resolution download
- Update createImageCaptureHandler() to detect googleusercontent.com URLs
- Update Strategy 2 to try full-res download for Google Photos before fallback
- Add Google Photos specific selectors to Strategy 3 element screenshot
